name: ReinforcementPulloutElement
summary: The ReinforcementPulloutElement class illustrates the shape and dimensions of a reinforcing bar in a drawing.

constructors.name: ReinforcementPulloutElement
constructors.summary: Creates a new reinforcement pull-out element instance.

methods.name: GetUnformattedString
methods.summary: Returns the content as a string without formatting.

returns.doc: The content as a string without formatting.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: AutomaticScaling
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the pull-out is scaled automatically or to a specified value.

properties.name: BendingAngle
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the pull-out bending angles.

properties.name: BendingRadius
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the pull-out bending radii.

properties.name: CouplersEndAnchorSymbols
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show coupler/anchor symbols or not.

properties.name: CouplersScale
properties.summary: Gets or sets the scale of coupler/anchor symbols.

properties.name: Dimensioning
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the pull-out dimensions.

properties.name: EndSymbolType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the ending marks.

properties.name: Exaggeration
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the pull-out is exaggerated.

properties.name: Font
properties.summary: Gets or sets the font of the dimension.

properties.name: RotationAxis
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rotation of the pull-out.

properties.name: ScaleX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the scaling of the pull-out in the X direction.

properties.name: ScaleY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the scaling of the pull-out in the Y direction.
